metadata.expected_artifacts: eval suite plan with task and criteria outlines

criteria.question: Does the response make proposed solver-visible tasks read like realistic maintainer requests rather than harness, grader, or self-eval instructions?
Does the response keep evaluator-only criteria, expected answers, and scoring notes out of the proposed task.md text?
Does the response include task outlines, criteria rows with Quality/Implementation/Validation coverage, fixture guidance, commands to run, and proof limits?
